calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Tim Barrow. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Marcia Wellington is present.
Attorney Richard Smoke representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

The case settled.The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-07-2011 is vacated.
